title: AFFORDABLE RENTALS - 211info
text: DEVNW CORVALLIS AFFORDABLE RENTALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing. There may be waitlists for units. 2525 SE Third Street Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Varies by property. Some properties may be set aside for older adults or adults with disabilities. Hours: Varies by property Email (541) 752-7220 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 752-7220 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by unit, credit check fee may apply. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and/or disability. Other documents may be required upon approval. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Benton, Lane, and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the second floor at the corner of 3rd Street and SW Madison Avenue. Services: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE HOUSING/SHELTER - LINN-BENTON-LINCOLN COUNTY HOME REPAIR PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW CORVALLIS
